articles.title: Is the Bitcoin bottom in? BTC derivatives point to limited price downside
articles.description: Bitcoin derivatives data suggest the bottom is in, but investors’ fears could limit a recovery beyond $100,000.

articles.title: Just In: Mexico Avoids U.S. Tariffs After Reaching Deal with Trump
articles.description: The post Just In: Mexico Avoids U.S. Tariffs After Reaching Deal with Trump appeared first on Coinpedia Fintech News In a latest development, Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum announced on Monday that Mexico has successfully avoided U.S. tariffs, at least for now, following an agreement with President Trump. Sheinbaum shared on X that she spoke with Trump on Monday morning, reaching a deal that delays his threat of imposing 25% tariffs on all Mexican goods …

articles.title: El Salvador Buys More Bitcoin While Adjusting Policies for IMF
articles.description: El Salvador adds 50 BTC to its reserves while adjusting Bitcoin policies to meet IMF loan conditions, reinforcing its commitment to Bitcoin adoption.

articles.title: More Parents Choose Bitcoin Over 529 College Savings Plans
articles.description: More parents in the US are shifting from 529 college savings plans to Bitcoin, seeing it as a hedge against inflation and a long-term investment.
